payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Rectangular black glossy picture frame with a wide white double mat and thin beige inner liner, containing a centered nautical anchor print on a beige background under glass with a noticeable reflection on the left; appears wall-mounted and photographed from roughly 0.8 m away.
